trans-unit.target: 看看 FSB 的实际表现

trans-unit.source: FSB still starts with natural-language browser automation. Through MCP, it also gives Codex, Claude, OpenClaw, and other agents a real browser surface for acting, observing, and iterating.
trans-unit.target: FSB 仍从自然语言浏览器自动化起步。通过 MCP，它还为 Codex、Claude、OpenClaw 等智能体提供真实的浏览器界面，用于执行、观察与迭代。
真实演示，真实浏览器操作

trans-unit.source: FSB still starts with a simple instruction, but these demos show the stronger loop: models and MCP agents operating the browser, observing what happened, and pushing the task forward.
trans-unit.target: FSB 仍以一条简单指令为起点，但这些演示展示了更强大的闭环：模型与 MCP 智能体操作浏览器、观察结果并推进任务。

trans-unit.source: Watch real FSB demos: Grok 4.1 e-commerce autopilot, Codex MCP flight booking, OpenClaw monitoring, and Claude-powered browser iteration.

trans-unit.source: Give your agent a real browser.
trans-unit.target: 给你的智能体一个真正的浏览器。

trans-unit.source: FSB ships a polished OpenClaw skill plus a 66-tool MCP surface that any agent runtime can drive. Click, type, orchestrate across tabs, fill vault credentials, read live page state, all from one prompt, in the user's actual Chrome.
trans-unit.target: FSB 附带打磨过的 OpenClaw 技能，以及任何智能体运行时都能驱动的 66 工具 MCP 界面。点击、输入、跨标签编排、填写 vault 凭据、读取实时页面状态——全部来自一条提示，在用户真实的 Chrome 中完成。

trans-unit.source: The canonical OpenClaw onboarding path for FSB. Loads cleanly into a fresh OpenClaw, runs the full diagnostic flow, and installs the bridge for any other MCP host on your machine.
trans-unit.target: OpenClaw 接入 FSB 的标准上手路径。可在全新的 OpenClaw 中无障碍加载，运行完整诊断流程，并为你机器上其他 MCP 宿主安装桥接。

trans-unit.source: Runs npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor, parses the failing layer (one of package, bridge, extension, active-tab, content-script, config), and prints the next step recommendation. Exit code surfaces failure to the host.
trans-unit.target: 运行 npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor，识别失败的层级（package、bridge、extension、active-tab、content-script、config），并打印下一步建议。退出码会将失败暴露给宿主。

trans-unit.source: Emits the canonical OpenClaw stdio block to paste into your MCP config. The block stays parity locked with mcp/src/install.ts so the printer never drifts from the rest of the installer.
trans-unit.target: 输出标准的 OpenClaw stdio 块，便于粘贴到你的 MCP 配置中。该块与 mcp/src/install.ts 保持一致，避免打印器与安装器其他部分发生漂移。
需用户同意的宿主安装

trans-unit.source: Detects other MCP hosts (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex, etc.) and asks y/n per host before installing. Never --all without consent. Never auto writes the OpenClaw config.
trans-unit.target: 检测其他 MCP 宿主（Claude Desktop、Cursor、Codex 等），并在安装前对每个宿主进行 y/n 确认。未经同意从不使用 --all，从不自动写入 OpenClaw 配置。
为什么 FSB MCP 如此强大

trans-unit.source: Browser automation usually means a headless instance you cannot see. FSB drives the user's actual Chrome session, and the MCP surface is built around four hard requirements: precision, observability, safety, and concurrency.
trans-unit.target: 通常浏览器自动化意味着一个看不见的无头实例。FSB 操控的是用户真实的 Chrome 会话，MCP 接口围绕四项硬性要求构建：精度、可观测性、安全性与并发性。

trans-unit.source: Read, click, type, navigate, vault, observe. All typed. All agent-scoped. One surface, no glue code.
trans-unit.target: 读取、点击、输入、导航、凭据库、观察。全部强类型，全部按智能体作用域划分。一个接口，无胶水代码。

trans-unit.source: Multi agent identity and tab ownership
trans-unit.target: 多智能体身份与标签归属

trans-unit.source: Server-minted agent_id per session. Tabs owned per agent. Cross-agent calls fail loud with TAB_NOT_OWNED. Cap 1-64 (default 8), AGENT_CAP_REACHED when full. No focus stealing.
trans-unit.target: 服务器按会话签发 agent_id。标签按智能体归属。跨智能体调用会以 TAB_NOT_OWNED 明确失败。上限 1-64（默认 8），满员时返回 AGENT_CAP_REACHED。绝不抢焦点。

trans-unit.source: Passwords and cards resolve inside the extension's encrypted store via fill_credential and use_payment_method. Never in chat. Never in args. requires.env is mandatory empty.
trans-unit.target: 密码和银行卡在扩展加密存储内通过 fill_credential 和 use_payment_method 解析使用。绝不进入对话，绝不出现在参数中。requires.env 必须为空。
真实的 Chrome、真实的会话

trans-unit.source: Your cookies. Your extensions. Your saved state. change_report streams mutations on every action — no extra read_page round-trip.
trans-unit.target: 你的 Cookie。你的扩展。你已保存的状态。change_report 在每次动作时流式推送变化——无需额外的 read_page 往返。

trans-unit.source: The recurring browser work. The boring, repetitive stuff that vision-based agents struggle with on logged-in sites. FSB runs in the user's real Chrome, so cookies, sessions, MFA state, and saved logins are already there.
trans-unit.target: 那些反复出现的浏览器工作。视觉系智能体在登录态网站上常常吃力的、枯燥重复的任务。FSB 运行在用户真实的 Chrome 中，Cookie、会话、MFA 状态以及已保存的登录信息都已就绪。

trans-unit.source: Open Gmail, label everything from billing as finance, draft replies to support threads using yesterday's tone, and flag anything urgent.
trans-unit.target: 打开 Gmail，把所有来自账单的邮件打上 finance 标签，沿用昨天的语气为支持线程起草回复，并把紧急的标出来。

trans-unit.source: In Zendesk, draft answers to open tickets about pricing, order status, and shipping using the help center as ground truth.
trans-unit.target: 在 Zendesk 中，为关于价格、订单状态、物流的待办工单起草回复，以帮助中心为依据。

trans-unit.source: Pull yesterday's revenue, signups, and refund count from the analytics dashboard and post a one paragraph summary.
trans-unit.target: 从分析控制台拉取昨日的营收、注册数和退款数，并发布一段总结。

trans-unit.source: Score new LinkedIn connection requests against the ICP, draft outreach for the top three, and skip the rest.
trans-unit.target: 把新的 LinkedIn 连接邀请按 ICP 打分，为前三名起草触达文案，其余跳过。

trans-unit.source: Categorize today's invoices in the POS as supplies vs. retail, extract shipping line items, and flag any vendor over last month's average.
trans-unit.target: 在 POS 中把今日发票按耗材或零售分类，提取物流项，并标记任何超过上月均值的供应商。

trans-unit.source: These run as manual-mode tool calls. Autopilot (run_task) only fires when the user explicitly delegates the whole task -- "use FSB autopilot", "delegate this", or names run_task directly. Manual mode is the default for everything else.
trans-unit.target: 这些以手动模式工具调用执行。自动驾驶（run_task）仅在用户显式委派整个任务时才触发——例如 “使用 FSB 自动驾驶”、“把这件事委托给你”，或直接调用 run_task。其余情况默认采用手动模式。

trans-unit.source: Ship a real browser to your agent today.
trans-unit.target: 今天就给智能体装上真正的浏览器。

trans-unit.source: Free, open source, BYO model keys. Works with OpenClaw, Claude, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP host that speaks the OpenAI tool protocol.
trans-unit.target: 免费、开源，自带模型密钥。可与 OpenClaw、Claude、Codex、Cursor、Windsurf 协作，也支持任何采用 MCP 且兼容 OpenAI 工具协议的宿主。
FSB - 智能体（OpenClaw 技能 + MCP）

trans-unit.source: Drive your real Chrome from OpenClaw, Hermes, Claude, Codex, Cursor, and more. FSB gives agents a skill plus 66 MCP tools to act, observe, verify.
trans-unit.target: 通过 OpenClaw、Hermes、Claude、Codex、Cursor 等驱动真实 Chrome。FSB 为智能体提供技能以及 66 个 MCP 工具，用于执行、观察与验证。

trans-unit.source: Canonical OpenClaw and Hermes onboarding path for FSB. Doctor flow, stdio config printer, consent-gated multi-host installer, and 66 MCP browser tools for the FSB MCP server.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的标准 OpenClaw 与 Hermes 接入路径。Doctor 流程、stdio 配置打印、经同意门控的多主机安装程序，以及面向 FSB MCP 服务器的 66 个 MCP 浏览器工具。

trans-unit.source: 66 MCP tools for browser action, observation, verification, and recovery
trans-unit.target: 66 个用于浏览器操作、观察、验证和恢复的 MCP 工具

trans-unit.source: Manual mode by default; run_task autopilot only on explicit delegation
trans-unit.target: 默认使用手动模式；只有在明确委派时才启用 run_task 自动驾驶

trans-unit.source: Vault tools fill credentials and payment methods without exposing raw secrets
trans-unit.target: Vault 工具可填充凭据和付款方式，而不会暴露原始密钥

trans-unit.source: Trigger watcher tools for reactive page monitoring
trans-unit.target: 用于响应式页面监控的触发器监视工具

trans-unit.source: Native capability tools for guarded first-party API actions
trans-unit.target: 用于受控第一方 API 操作的原生能力工具

trans-unit.source: Install FSB for an MCP agent
trans-unit.target: 为 MCP 智能体安装 FSB

trans-unit.source: Install the FSB MCP bridge, verify it with doctor, then let an MCP host drive the user's real Chrome session.
trans-unit.target: 安装 FSB MCP 桥接器，使用 doctor 进行验证，然后让 MCP 宿主控制用户真实的 Chrome 会话。
安装 Chrome 扩展程序

trans-unit.source: Install FSB from the Chrome Web Store or load the extension from source.
trans-unit.target: 从 Chrome Web Store 安装 FSB，或从源代码加载扩展程序。

trans-unit.source: Use the FSB skill, ClawHub, or npx -y fsb-mcp-server install for a supported MCP host.
trans-unit.target: 对于受支持的 MCP 宿主，请使用 FSB 技能、ClawHub 或 npx -y fsb-mcp-server install。

trans-unit.source: Run npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor and fix any failing package, bridge, extension, active-tab, content-script, or config layer.
trans-unit.target: 运行 npx -y fsb-mcp-server doctor，并修复软件包、桥接器、扩展程序、活动标签页、内容脚本或配置层中的任何故障。
连接到您的 FSB 扩展程序

trans-unit.source: Point camera at QR code in FSB extension
trans-unit.target: 将相机对准 FSB 扩展程序中的二维码

trans-unit.source: Open the Sync tab in FSB to find your hash key and pair this dashboard.
trans-unit.target: 打开 FSB 中的“同步”标签页，找到您的哈希密钥，然后将其与此控制面板配对。

trans-unit.source: Wake up the extension service worker
trans-unit.target: 唤醒扩展程序工作进程
将浏览器导航到此网址

trans-unit.source: This page can't be streamed. Use the URL bar above to open a website.
trans-unit.target: 此页面无法进行流式传输。请使用上方的地址栏打开网站。

trans-unit.source: The extension may have navigated to a restricted page
trans-unit.target: 扩展程序可能已导航到受限页面
后台智能体功能已移除。

trans-unit.source: FSB no longer ships scheduled or recurring agent runs. For that work, the recommended successors are OpenClaw (open-source agent loop) and Claude Routines (managed long-running automations). The dashboard above continues to show live remote-control state and DOM streaming for one-shot task execution.
trans-unit.target: FSB 不再提供计划任务或定期运行的智能体。对于此类工作，推荐使用 OpenClaw（开源智能体循环）或 Claude Routines（托管式长时间运行自动化）。上方的控制面板仍会显示实时远程控制状态和一次性任务执行的 DOM 流。

trans-unit.source: Control your paired FSB extension, run one-shot browser tasks, and monitor the live browser preview.
trans-unit.target: 控制已配对的 FSB 扩展，运行一次性浏览器任务，并监控实时浏览器预览。

trans-unit.source: Open a normal browser page to resume preview
trans-unit.target: 打开普通浏览器页面以恢复预览

trans-unit.target: 流式传输标签页已关闭。请打开另一个页面以恢复预览

trans-unit.source: Waiting for the browser page to finish loading
trans-unit.target: 正在等待浏览器页面加载完毕

trans-unit.source: Open a browser tab with a normal web page to start preview
trans-unit.target: 打开包含普通网页的浏览器标签页以开始预览
正在等待实时页面预览…
流已断开连接——正在显示最后一帧
任务已完成——正在显示最终页面

trans-unit.target: 已向扩展程序发送远程控制请求

trans-unit.target: 预览目标已更改。请重新启用远程控制以继续。

trans-unit.target: 远程控制的调试器会话已丢失。请重新启用后重试。

trans-unit.target: 另一个调试器已占用该浏览器标签页。

trans-unit.target: 远程控制无法连接到该浏览器标签页。

trans-unit.target: 扩展程序未确认远程控制。

trans-unit.target: 重新连接或发送另一条进度更新

trans-unit.target: 未找到可用的浏览器标签页

trans-unit.target: 二维码中不含配对令牌

The pairing code has already been used

trans-unit.source: Point camera at QR code in FSB extension
trans-unit.target: 将相机对准 FSB 扩展程序中的二维码
任务恢复超时——此前操作：
正在恢复（已持续 秒）
已由用户停止——此前操作：

trans-unit.source: AI-powered browser automation through natural language. Tell it what to do, and watch it browse for you.
trans-unit.target: 用自然语言驱动的 AI 浏览器自动化。告诉它要做什么，看着它替你浏览。

trans-unit.source: Everything you need for intelligent browser automation, powered by leading AI models.
trans-unit.target: 由领先的 AI 模型驱动，提供智能浏览器自动化所需的一切。

trans-unit.source: Beyond clicking. FSB can call an app's own authenticated API through your logged-in session. Faster and more reliable than DOM automation, with DOM as the automatic fallback. Inspired by OpenTabs.
trans-unit.target: 除了点击之外。 FSB 可以通过您登录的会话调用应用程序自己经过身份验证的 API。比 DOM 自动化更快、更可靠，以 DOM 作为自动后备。灵感来自 OpenTabs。

trans-unit.source: Click, type, scroll, drag-and-drop, canvas drawing, CDP mouse control, multi-tab management, and more. 53 DOM actions plus 7 through the Chrome DevTools Protocol.
trans-unit.target: 单击、键入、滚动、拖放、画布绘图、CDP 鼠标控制、多选项卡管理等等。 53 个 DOM 操作加上通过 Chrome DevTools Protocol 执行的 7 个操作。

trans-unit.source: Watch any element and get notified the instant a value changes, crosses a threshold, or matches a pattern.
trans-unit.target: 监视任何元素，并在值发生变化、超过阈值或匹配模式时立即收到通知。

trans-unit.source: Incremental DOM diffing, multi-strategy selectors, and element identification for reliable automation.
trans-unit.target: 增量 DOM 差分、多策略选择器以及元素识别，让自动化更可靠。

trans-unit.source: Rebuilt on the Lattice SDK, long runs survive Chrome's MV3 shutdowns and finish. Up to 64 concurrent tabs, plus real file uploads from disk.
trans-unit.target: 在 Lattice SDK 上重建，长期运行 Chrome MV3 关闭并完成。最多 64 个并发选项卡，以及从磁盘上传的实际文件。

trans-unit.source: Glow borders, pulsing element highlights, and a floating progress overlay show exactly what FSB is doing.
trans-unit.target: 发光边框、脉冲元素高光和浮动进度叠加层准确显示了 FSB 正在做什么。

trans-unit.source: 130+ built-in site guides across 17 categories, from commerce to coding.
trans-unit.target: 130 多个内置网站指南，涵盖 17 个类别，从商业到编码。

trans-unit.source: Use FSB as an MCP server from Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, or any MCP client. 66 tools, with browser automation straight from your IDE.
trans-unit.target: 使用FSB作为MCP服务器来自Claude Code,Codex,Cursor,OpenClaw，或任何MCP客户。 66 个工具，可直接从 IDE 实现浏览器自动化。

trans-unit.source: Monitor and control FSB from any device. QR-code pairing, a live DOM preview powered by PhantomStream, now with media mirroring, and real-time task execution.

trans-unit.source: FSB remembers navigation patterns across sites. Semantic, episodic, and procedural memory for smarter automation over time.
trans-unit.target: FSB 跨站点记住导航模式。语义、情景、过程性三类记忆让自动化随着时间越来越聪明。

trans-unit.source: Better Than All of Them. Without Vision.
Project Mariner, Claude Computer Use, OpenAI Operator, OpenClaw. They all rely on vision to understand the page. FSB reads the actual DOM. No vision needed. Faster. Cheaper. More accurate.
trans-unit.target: Project Mariner、Claude Computer Use、OpenAI Operator、OpenClaw。它们都依靠视觉理解页面。FSB 读取真实的 DOM。无需视觉，更快、更便宜、更准确。

trans-unit.source: Better than all of them. Pure structural intelligence. Zero vision. Zero guessing.

trans-unit.source: FSB does not just compete. It complements. Through its MCP server, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible agent can use FSB as their browser automation layer. The intelligence of any AI combined with the precision of FSB's DOM engine.
trans-unit.target: FSB 不只是竞争，更是互补。通过它的 MCP 服务器，Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Windsurf 以及任何兼容 MCP 的智能体都能把 FSB 用作浏览器自动化层。把任意 AI 的智能与 FSB DOM 引擎的精度结合在一起。

trans-unit.source: It clicks when it must. It calls APIs when it can.

trans-unit.source: FSB no longer has to drive a UI for everything. For supported apps it talks straight to the app's own authenticated API through your logged-in session, far faster and more reliable than DOM automation, and falls back to clicking automatically when no API exists.
trans-unit.target: FSB 不再需要为所有事情驱动 UI。对于受支持的应用程序，它会通过您的登录会话直接与应用程序自己经过身份验证的 API 进行对话，比 DOM 自动化更快、更可靠，并且在不存在 API 时回退到自动单击。

最后更新时间：2026 年 7 月

trans-unit.source: This document records FSB's legal/Terms-of-Service posture, its consent model, the audit-log retention policy, and the service-denylist rationale. It is the human-readable companion to the runtime controls shipped in Phase 30 (consent governance, recipe signature verification, the no-secrets audit log, and the service denylist).
trans-unit.target: 本文档记录了 FSB 的法律/服务条款立场、其同意机制、审计日志留存策略，以及服务拒绝名单（denylist）的制定依据。它是 Phase 30 中所交付的运行时控制机制（同意治理、Recipe 签名验证、无机密信息审计日志，以及服务拒绝名单）的人类可读配套说明。

trans-unit.source: Scope note: this is an engineering governance document, not legal advice. It describes how FSB is built to behave and the boundaries it enforces.
trans-unit.target: 范围说明：本文档是一份工程治理文档，并非法律意见。它描述的是 FSB 被设计成如何运作，以及它所强制执行的边界。

trans-unit.source: FSB (Full Self-Browsing) is a supervised, local-first browser-automation capability layer. The posture is deliberately conservative:
trans-unit.target: FSB（Full Self-Browsing）是一个受监督、本地优先的浏览器自动化能力层。其整体立场是刻意保持保守的：

trans-unit.source: Opt-out per origin. The shipped default is Auto for non-denied origins, with per-origin Off / Ask / Auto controls. The user can opt any origin out, and can set the global default to Off to restore strict opt-in behavior.
trans-unit.target: 按来源（origin）退出（opt-out）。系统出厂默认对未被拒绝的来源采用 Auto（自动）模式，并提供按来源设置的 Off（关闭）/ Ask（询问）/ Auto（自动）控制项。用户可以将任意来源设为退出，也可以将全局默认值设为 Off，以恢复严格的加入式（opt-in）行为。

trans-unit.source: Local execution. Automation runs in the user's own authenticated browser session. FSB does not proxy a user's credentials to any server and does not replay captured credentials off-device.
trans-unit.target: 本地执行。自动化操作运行于用户自己已登录的浏览器会话中。FSB 不会将用户的凭据代理转发至任何服务器，也不会在设备之外重放已捕获的凭据。

trans-unit.source: Respect site Terms of Service.FSB is a general-purpose automation tool; the operator is responsible for using it within the Terms of Service of the sites they automate. FSB ships a service policy file (below) that currently hard-denies Netflix and OnlyFans, and classifies additional sensitive categories for mutating-write gating and audit visibility.
trans-unit.target: 遵守网站服务条款。FSB 是一款通用型自动化工具；操作者有责任在其所自动化操作的网站服务条款范围内使用本工具。FSB 随附一份服务政策文件（见下文），目前该文件对 Netflix 和 OnlyFans 实施硬性拒绝，并将其他敏感类别归类，以纳入写操作变更门控与审计可见性范围。

trans-unit.source: No code fetched as data. Recipes are closed-vocabulary JSON data, not code. The recipe interpreter is dynamic-code-free, and server-delivered or learned recipes (a future capability) must pass cryptographic signature verification before they can bind to a credentialed call.
trans-unit.target: 不将代码作为数据抓取。Recipe 是封闭词汇表的 JSON 数据，而非代码。Recipe 解释器不含任何动态代码执行机制，服务端下发或后续学习得到的 Recipe（一项未来能力）在绑定到带凭据的调用之前，必须先通过加密签名验证。

trans-unit.source: Consent is enforced at a single dispatch chokepoint (one gate, both front doors), immediately after the existing ownership gate. The shipped posture is opt-out ("fully open"): a global default mode applies to every origin the user has not explicitly configured, and the user opts individual origins out. The global default ships as Auto and is user-configurable (Off / Ask / Auto) under Advanced Settings → Consent & Audit → "Default for New Sites".
trans-unit.target: 同意机制在单一的调度关卡（一个关口，覆盖两个入口）强制执行，紧接在现有的归属权（ownership）关卡之后。系统出厂的立场为退出式（“完全开放”）：全局默认模式适用于用户尚未显式配置的每一个来源，用户可以将单个来源逐一退出。全局默认值出厂设置为 Auto，且用户可在“高级设置 → 同意与审计 → "Default for New Sites"”中自行配置（Off / Ask / Auto）。

trans-unit.source: Capability invocations run without per-call prompting, including reads and writes, against any non-denylisted origin, except that a write to a sensitive origin re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in at the invoke gate (posture B / DENY-04; see the Categorization Axes below). Reads, and writes to non-sensitive origins, run freely under Auto.
trans-unit.target: 针对任何未列入拒绝名单的来源，能力调用无需逐次调用提示即可运行，包括读取和写入操作，唯一例外是对敏感来源的写入会在调用（invoke）关卡重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意（posture B / DENY-04；参见下文的“分类维度”）。读取操作以及对非敏感来源的写入操作在 Auto 模式下均可自由运行。

trans-unit.source: Each invocation surfaces a pending request out-of-band (control panel + a badge) for the user to grant; nothing runs until granted. There is no blocking in-page modal mid-invocation.
trans-unit.target: 每次调用都会以带外（out-of-band）方式呈现一个待处理请求（控制面板 + 提示徽标），供用户授权；在获得授权之前不会运行任何操作。调用过程中不会出现阻塞式的页内弹窗。

trans-unit.source: Nothing runs against the origin. Capability invocations return a typed consent-required reason. Set an individual origin to Off to opt it out, or set the global default to Off to restore strict opt-in.
trans-unit.target: 不会对该来源运行任何操作。能力调用会返回一个类型化的“需要同意”原因。将单个来源设为 Off 即可将其退出，或将全局默认值设为 Off 以恢复严格的加入式模式。

trans-unit.source: Denylist is the one hard block. A denylisted origin is non-enableable regardless of the global default or any per-origin policy. The current hard denylist is intentionally narrow: Netflix and OnlyFans. The denylist is consulted first, before the consent mode.
trans-unit.target: 拒绝名单是唯一的硬性阻断。无论全局默认值或任何按来源策略如何设置，被列入拒绝名单的来源均不可启用。当前的硬性拒绝名单刻意保持精简：Netflix 和 OnlyFans。拒绝名单会在同意模式之前最先被查询。

trans-unit.source: Per-origin opt-out. Every origin FSB acts on is listed in the control panel (sourced from the audit trail) so the user can set it to Off (or Ask) at any time. An explicit per-origin policy overrides the global default.
trans-unit.target: 按来源退出。FSB 所操作的每一个来源都会（依据审计轨迹）列示在控制面板中，因此用户可以随时将其设为 Off（或 Ask）。显式设置的按来源策略会覆盖全局默认值。

trans-unit.source: Writes to non-sensitive origins are allowed under Auto. Under the opt-out posture, for a non-sensitive origin read-Auto implies write-Auto: side-effecting invocations (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) run without a separate elevated opt-in, and the per-origin mutating flag is inert at the invoke gate. A write to a sensitive origin is the exception: it re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in at the invoke gate (posture B / DENY-04), so the mutating flag IS consulted there for sensitive origins (see the Categorization Axes section). Reads run under Auto everywhere.
trans-unit.target: 在 Auto 模式下允许对非敏感来源进行写入。在退出式立场下，对于非敏感来源而言，读取的 Auto 状态即意味着写入的 Auto 状态：会产生副作用的调用（POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE）无需单独的提级加入式同意即可运行，此时按来源设置的变更（mutating）标志在调用关卡处于不生效状态。对敏感来源的写入则是例外：它会在调用关卡重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意（posture B / DENY-04），因此对于敏感来源，该变更标志在此处确实会被查询（参见“分类维度”一节）。读取操作在所有场景下均在 Auto 模式下运行。

trans-unit.source: Sensitive-origin writes are re-gated at the invoke gate; reads are not. Origins classified as sensitive (banking, primary email, government, and the payments / budgeting / social / messaging categories below) run reads under Auto, but a write re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in at the capability invoke gate (posture B / DENY-04) before it is permitted. In addition, the more invasive network-capture discovery path keeps its own, broader explicit confirmation for sensitive origins. (Sensitive writes are NOT ungated under Auto: the invoke gate re-applies the mutating opt-in for them.)
trans-unit.target: 敏感来源的写入会在调用关卡被重新把关；读取操作则不会。被归类为敏感的来源（银行、主邮箱、政府机构，以及下文的支付/预算/社交/消息类别）会在 Auto 模式下运行读取操作，但写入操作会在能力调用关卡重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意（posture B / DENY-04），获准之后方可执行。此外，侵入性更强的网络抓取发现路径针对敏感来源仍保留其自身范围更广的显式确认机制。（敏感来源的写入操作在 Auto 模式下并非不设防：调用关卡会针对它们重新应用变更加入式同意。）

trans-unit.source: Reverting to opt-in. Setting the global default to Off restores the strict opt-in posture: nothing runs against an origin until the user enables it.
trans-unit.target: 恢复为加入式。将全局默认值设为 Off 可恢复严格的加入式立场：在用户启用某个来源之前，不会对其运行任何操作。

trans-unit.source: Security note: under the shipped Auto default, FSB can call a non-denylisted site's authenticated web API using the browser's logged-in session, without a per-site prompt: reads everywhere, and writes to non-sensitive origins. A write to a sensitive origin is re-gated at the invoke gate (it re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in; posture B / DENY-04). This is a deliberate, user-configurable posture; the denylist, the per-origin and global opt-out, the sensitive-write re-gate, the active-tab origin pin, the fail-closed degradation path, and the append-only audit trail remain in force.
trans-unit.target: 安全说明：在出厂的 Auto 默认设置下，FSB 可以利用浏览器已登录的会话，在无需针对该站点单独提示的情况下，调用某个未被列入拒绝名单站点的已认证 Web API：所有站点的读取操作，以及对非敏感来源的写入操作皆可如此。对敏感来源的写入会在调用关卡被重新把关（重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意；posture B / DENY-04）。这是一种刻意设计、且可由用户自行配置的立场；拒绝名单、按来源与全局的退出机制、敏感写入的重新把关、活动标签页来源锁定、失败即关闭（fail-closed）降级路径，以及只追加（append-only）的审计轨迹，均持续有效。

trans-unit.source: Every capability invocation is recorded in an append-only, secret-free audit log so the operator can review what ran.
trans-unit.target: 每一次能力调用都会被记录在一份只追加、无机密信息的审计日志中，以便操作者审阅曾执行过哪些操作。

trans-unit.source: The audit entry schema is, by construction, free of secrets and request payloads:
trans-unit.target: 审计条目的模式（schema）在设计上就不含机密信息与请求负载：

trans-unit.source: The audit log never stores invocation arguments, request or response bodies, cookies, tokens, CSRF values, bearer credentials, or any other authentication material. Auth material never leaves the device and is never persisted. Every recorded field additionally passes through a shape-only redactor before persistence (URLs are reduced to their origin; strings to a shape descriptor; errors to name and message only). A test asserts that no authentication substring survives in the persisted log.
trans-unit.target: 审计日志绝不存储调用参数、请求或响应正文、Cookie、令牌（token）、CSRF 值、持有者凭据（bearer credentials），或任何其他身份验证材料。身份验证材料绝不会离开设备，也绝不会被持久化保存。每一个被记录的字段都会在持久化之前额外经过一个仅保留结构信息的脱敏处理器（URL 被简化为其来源；字符串被简化为结构描述符；错误信息仅保留名称与消息）。有一项测试专门用于断言持久化日志中不会残留任何身份验证相关的子字符串。

trans-unit.source: The audit log is a bounded ring buffer: the most recent entries are retained and older entries are trimmed automatically (FIFO). The user has an export and clear control to export the current log and clear it on demand. The log is secret-free by construction; encryption at rest is therefore unnecessary and is out of scope. Long-term archival and deeper retention tooling are intentionally deferred; the bounded ring plus export/clear is the Phase-30 retention policy.
trans-unit.target: 审计日志是一个有界环形缓冲区（ring buffer）：系统会保留最近的条目，较旧的条目会被自动裁剪（先进先出，FIFO）。用户可使用导出与清除控件按需导出当前日志并将其清除。该日志在设计上就不含机密信息；因此静态加密并非必要，也不在本设计范围之内。长期归档与更深入的留存工具目前刻意暂缓提供；有界环形缓冲区加上导出/清除功能，即是 Phase 30 阶段的留存策略。

trans-unit.source: FSB ships a conservative service denylist at extension/config/service-denylist.json, loaded at service-worker startup and consulted before per-origin consent. It is the single source of truth for whether an origin is denied or sensitive.
trans-unit.target: FSB 在 extension/config/service-denylist.json 中随附了一份保守的服务拒绝名单，该名单在 Service Worker 启动时加载，并在按来源同意判断之前被查询。它是判断某来源是否被拒绝或敏感的唯一权威依据（single source of truth）。

trans-unit.source: deniedOrigins: the hard block list. Current runtime policy intentionally narrows this to Netflix and OnlyFans. A denylisted origin is rendered non-enableable: the consent gate blocks it even if a stored policy says Auto, and the control panel greys it out with the documented reason.
trans-unit.target: deniedOrigins：硬性阻断列表。当前的运行时策略刻意将其范围缩小至 Netflix 与 OnlyFans。被列入拒绝名单的来源会被渲染为不可启用状态：即便已存储的策略显示为 Auto，同意关卡也会将其阻断，控制面板会将其显示为灰色并附上文档化的原因说明。

trans-unit.source: sensitiveOrigins: allowed-but-governed origins. This includes banking, government, primary email, brokerage / trading, payments, money movement, social, messaging, media, AI-chat, commerce, travel, and other categories that require mutating-write gating and audit visibility but are not hard-denied.
trans-unit.target: sensitiveOrigins：允许但受治理约束的来源。这包括银行、政府机构、主邮箱、券商/交易、支付、资金转移、社交、消息通讯、媒体、AI 聊天、电商，以及旅行等其他类别，这些类别需要变更写入的门控与审计可见性，但并不被硬性拒绝。

trans-unit.source: The service policy is conservative without being an aggressive broad blocklist, and it is user-extensible. Host patterns use a https://*.<domain> subdomain-wildcard form (matching the apex and any subdomain) or an exact origin. A comprehensive, per-service legal review is ongoing; the policy file establishes the mechanism and the current default posture.
trans-unit.target: 该服务政策在保持保守的同时，并未成为一份激进的大范围阻断名单，并且它是可由用户扩展的。主机匹配模式采用 https://*.<domain> 子域通配符形式（匹配顶级域名及其任意子域名），或采用精确来源匹配。一项全面的、按服务逐一进行的法律审查工作正在进行中；该政策文件确立了相应机制以及当前的默认立场。

trans-unit.source: An origin's classification is decided along three distinct criteria. These axes are independent: an origin can be hard-denied, allowed-but-sensitive, or safe. service-denylist.js classify(origin) is the single source of truth that resolves an origin to denied / sensitive / safe.
trans-unit.target: 一个来源的分类依据三项互不相同的标准来判定。这些维度彼此独立：一个来源可能是硬性拒绝、允许但敏感，或安全的。service-denylist.js classify(origin) 是将某来源判定为拒绝/敏感/安全的唯一权威依据。

trans-unit.source: Hard denial. Hard-denied origins are non-enableable regardless of consent mode. The current runtime hard-denied roster is intentionally narrow: netflix and onlyfans.
trans-unit.target: 硬性拒绝。无论同意模式如何，被硬性拒绝的来源均不可启用。当前运行时的硬性拒绝名单刻意保持精简：netflix 与 onlyfans。

trans-unit.source: Sensitive governance (Ask / mutating-gated). Allowed-but-sensitive origins are not hard-denied. Reads run under Auto everywhere; a write to a sensitive origin re-enforces the per-origin mutating opt-in (posture B / DENY-04) before it is permitted. This is where banking and government hosts, primary email, brokerage / trading (robinhood, fidelity, carta), payments and money movement, budgeting, social, messaging, media, and AI-chat origins sit. For example, instagram, facebook, tiktok, and x are sensitive, not denied; their reads remain available under Auto and their writes are gated. Payments (e.g. dashboard.stripe.com, coinbase, twilio), Carta read-only portfolio/account data, budgeting (ynab), and messaging-app writes are classified on this axis as well.
trans-unit.target: 敏感治理（Ask / 变更门控）。允许但敏感的来源并不会被硬性拒绝。读取操作在所有场景下都可在 Auto 模式下运行；对敏感来源的写入操作会在获准之前重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意（posture B / DENY-04）。银行与政府机构主机、主邮箱、券商/交易（robinhood、fidelity、carta）、支付与资金转移、预算管理、社交、消息通讯、媒体，以及 AI 聊天类来源，均属于此维度。举例来说，instagram、facebook、tiktok 以及 x 均属于敏感来源，而非被拒绝来源；其读取操作在 Auto 模式下仍可使用，其写入操作则受到门控。支付类来源（例如 dashboard.stripe.com、coinbase、twilio）、Carta 的只读投资组合/账户数据、预算管理（ynab），以及消息应用的写入操作，同样在此维度上被分类。

trans-unit.source: The comms / social / content import batch extends this axis. The AI-chat apps (chatgpt, claude) and the microblog / fediverse social apps (bluesky, mastodon, threads) are classified sensitive: their reads run under Auto, their writes (post / send / publish) re-enforce the per-origin mutating opt-in. This is the conservative default for the category: an unknown social / AI app defaults toward LESS reach, because a mis-classification that read as "safe" would make the app writable-under-Auto (able to post or message on someone's account). These hosts contain no generic category keyword the import-time heuristic flags, so they are classified explicitly on this axis rather than relying on the heuristic to catch them. The discord messaging origin remains sensitive (writes mutating-gated). Media and social origins such as spotify, twitch, steam, youtube, youtube-music, and tinder are sensitive, not denied; their writes are gated and guarded as applicable. netflix and onlyfans remain hard-denied.
trans-unit.target: 通讯 / 社交 / 内容批量导入进一步扩展了这一维度。AI 聊天应用（chatgpt、claude）以及微博客/联邦宇宙（fediverse）类社交应用（bluesky、mastodon、threads）均被归类为敏感：其读取操作在 Auto 模式下运行，其写入操作（发布/发送/公开发表）会重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意。这是该类别的保守默认设置：一个未知的社交/AI 应用默认朝“更小的可达范围”方向倾斜，因为一次将其误判为“安全”的分类错误，会使该应用在 Auto 模式下即可被写入（能够以他人账号发帖或发送消息）。这些主机不包含导入时启发式规则所标记的任何通用类别关键词，因此它们是在此维度上被显式分类的，而非依赖启发式规则去捕获。discord 消息通讯来源仍保持敏感状态（写入操作受变更门控）。诸如 spotify、twitch、steam、youtube、youtube-music 以及 tinder 等媒体与社交类来源均属于敏感来源，而非被拒绝来源；其写入操作会视情况受到门控与保护。netflix 与 onlyfans 则仍保持硬性拒绝状态。

trans-unit.source: Independent of this axis, every comms / social / content descriptor the batch imports is DOM-only (the conservative backing default): it is surfaced as a discovery-pending hit, never a confident API-invocable hit, and is never learn-seeded, so a ToS-hostile or AI-chat app is never auto-driven through a fabricated API call from guessed auth.
trans-unit.target: 独立于此维度之外，该批次导入的每一个通讯/社交/内容类描述符都是仅限 DOM（DOM-only）的（保守的兜底默认设置）：它只会被呈现为一个“待发现”的命中结果，而绝不是一个可自信调用 API 的命中结果，也绝不会被用作学习种子，因此一个对服务条款不友好或属于 AI 聊天类的应用，绝不会被凭猜测得来的认证信息虚构出的 API 调用所自动驱动。

trans-unit.source: Payment / money-movement classification (the commerce / travel / misc batch). The most-sensitive import batch is screened along a payment dimension layered onto these three axes, because a payment-bearing op writable under Auto = money moved without consent (an order placed, a card charged, a paid reservation booked). The classification follows the money:
trans-unit.target: 支付/资金转移分类（电商 / 旅行 / 其他批次）。敏感程度最高的导入批次是沿着叠加在上述三项维度之上的支付维度进行筛查的，因为一个在 Auto 模式下可写入的支付类操作 = 未经同意即发生资金转移（下单购买、信用卡被扣款、完成一笔付费预订）。其分类原则是循着资金流向而定：

trans-unit.source: Payment-bearing commerce / travel / paid-booking origins → sensitive. Food delivery and rideshare (doordash, ubereats, uber, lyft, grubhub, instacart, dominos, chipotle), retail / marketplace checkout (amazon, ebay, etsy, bestbuy, costco, walmart, target, craigslist, shopify), and travel / transport paid bookings (booking, airbnb, expedia, kayak, opentable) are classified sensitive: their reads run under Auto, their writes (place-order / checkout / book) re-enforce the per-origin mutating opt-in (posture B). This is the conservative default for the category: an unknown commerce / payment app defaults toward LESS reach (sensitive, never safe-writable). opentable is sensitive unconditionally: an OpenTable reservation holds a card, so a held-card / paid reservation is payment-adjacent even when no "checkout" op is present.
trans-unit.target: 涉及支付的电商 / 旅行 / 付费预订类来源 → 敏感。外卖配送与网约车（doordash、ubereats、uber、lyft、grubhub、instacart、dominos、chipotle）、零售/电商平台结账（amazon、ebay、etsy、bestbuy、costco、walmart、target、craigslist、shopify），以及旅行/交通类付费预订（booking、airbnb、expedia、kayak、opentable）均被归类为敏感：其读取操作在 Auto 模式下运行，其写入操作（下单/结账/预订）会重新强制执行按来源的变更加入式同意（posture B）。这是该类别的保守默认设置：一个未知的电商/支付类应用默认朝“更小的可达范围”方向倾斜（敏感，绝不安全可写）。opentable 无条件属于敏感来源：一次 OpenTable 预订会预先绑定一张信用卡，因此即便当前不存在“结账”这一操作，一次持卡/付费预订本身也已与支付密切相关。

trans-unit.source: Pure money-movement apps → sensitive. Standalone peer-to-peer money-transfer / wallet apps (paypal, venmo, cash app, wise, western union) are sensitive, not hard-denied. Reads are allowed under Auto; mutating actions are gated by the sensitive-origin write path and by the payment-op guard.
trans-unit.target: 纯资金转移类应用 → 敏感。独立的点对点转账/钱包类应用（paypal、venmo、cash app、wise、western union）属于敏感来源，而非硬性拒绝来源。读取操作在 Auto 模式下被允许；变更类操作则会受到敏感来源写入路径以及支付操作防护机制的门控。

trans-unit.source: Read-only commerce browsing → safe. Pure-availability or read-only apps whose vendored ops are all reads (calendly availability links, yelp / tripadvisor business search, zillow listings, grafana dashboards) stay safe (unclassified, reads run under Auto). The import-time heuristic's payment tokens are deliberately SPECIFIC (checkout / cart / place-order / charge, NOT a bare order / book / reserve) so a benign commerce read is not false-tripped; a safe commerce origin is added to the read-only-safe invariant set ONLY when its emitted ops are verified read-only.
trans-unit.target: 只读电商浏览 → 安全。其所有内置操作均为读取操作的纯查询可用性/只读类应用（calendly 的可用性链接、yelp / tripadvisor 的商家搜索、zillow 的房源列表、grafana 仪表盘）会保持安全（未分类，读取操作在 Auto 模式下运行）。导入时启发式规则所使用的支付类关键词被刻意设计得十分具体（checkout / cart / place-order / charge，而非笼统的 order / book / reserve），以避免一次良性的电商读取操作被误判触发；只有当某个电商来源所产生的操作被验证确为只读时，它才会被加入只读安全不变集（read-only-safe invariant set）。

trans-unit.source: What makes money-movement-under-Auto impossible is the payment-origin gate, established for this batch before any payment descriptor lands: (a) payment origins are sensitive (posture-B gated); (b) an import-time payment-op CI guard fails the build if any payment-bearing op (checkout / pay / place_order / charge / complete_booking / buy_tickets / book_flight / request_ride / place_bid / create_order / ...) is ever classified on an ungated origin. A payment write therefore can only flow on a sensitive origin, where the per-origin mutating opt-in re-gates it, or not ship at all.
trans-unit.target: 使在 Auto 模式下发生资金转移成为不可能的关键机制，是在任何支付类描述符落地之前，为该批次专门设立的支付来源关卡：(a) 支付类来源被归类为敏感（受 posture-B 门控）；(b) 一项导入时的支付操作 CI 防护检查会在任何涉及支付的操作（checkout / pay / place_order / charge / complete_booking / buy_tickets / book_flight / request_ride / place_bid / create_order / ……）被归类到未受门控的来源上时，使构建失败。因此，一次支付类写入操作要么只能在敏感来源上运行（此时按来源设置的变更加入式同意会对其重新把关），要么根本无法交付上线。

trans-unit.source: The hard-denial axis makes an origin non-enableable; the sensitivity axes keep an origin usable but re-apply write-time friction. An import-time classification gate fails the build if a sensitivity-suspect origin is left unclassified, so a gap in the classification can never silently read as "allow".
trans-unit.target: 硬性拒绝维度使某个来源不可启用；敏感性维度则在保持来源可用的同时，对写入时刻重新施加限制。一项导入时的分类关卡会在某个疑似敏感来源未被分类时使构建失败，因此分类中的疏漏永远不会被静默地解读为“允许”。

trans-unit.source: Server-delivered and learned recipes (a future capability) are untrusted data and must be signature-verified before they can bind to a credentialed call. Verification uses Ed25519 over the RFC-8785 JCS canonical form of the recipe provenance envelope, performed inside the interpreter after schema validation and before binding. A tampered or unsigned non-bundled recipe is rejected with a typed RECIPE_SIGNATURE_INVALID reason. Verification fails closed: if the platform cannot perform Ed25519 verification, a non-bundled recipe is rejected rather than trusted.
trans-unit.target: 服务端下发以及后续学习得到的 Recipe（一项未来能力）均属于不受信任的数据，在其可绑定到带凭据的调用之前，必须经过签名验证。验证采用 Ed25519 算法，作用于 Recipe 溯源信封（provenance envelope）的 RFC-8785 JCS 规范化形式之上，在解释器内部于模式（schema）校验之后、绑定之前执行。任何被篡改或未签名的非内置 Recipe，都会因一个类型化的 RECIPE_SIGNATURE_INVALID 原因而被拒绝。验证机制遵循失败即关闭（fail-closed）原则：如果平台无法执行 Ed25519 验证，一个非内置的 Recipe 会被拒绝，而不会被默认信任。

trans-unit.source: First-party bundled recipes (shipped and reviewed with the extension) are trusted-by-provenance and exempt from the verify gate, so the bundled capability head is unaffected. The trusted public key ships in the extension bundle; it is never fetched remotely. The private signing key is offline.
trans-unit.target: 第一方内置 Recipe（随扩展程序一同交付并经过审查）因其来源可信（trusted-by-provenance）而豁免于验证关卡，因此内置能力主干不受此影响。受信任的公钥随扩展程序包一同交付；它绝不会通过远程方式获取。私有签名密钥则处于离线状态。

trans-unit.source: For questions about this posture or FSB's data handling, open an issue on the project's GitHub repository.
trans-unit.target: 如对本立场声明或 FSB 的数据处理方式有任何疑问，请在该项目的 GitHub 仓库中提交一个 issue。

trans-unit.source: FSB's automation posture, consent model, audit-log retention policy, and service-denylist rationale.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的自动化立场、同意机制、审计日志留存策略，以及服务拒绝名单的制定依据。

trans-unit.source: DOM-native live browser mirroring. A real tab streamed as structured DOM, not pixels.
trans-unit.target: DOM 原生的实时浏览器镜像。把真实标签页以结构化 DOM 流式传输，而不是像素。

trans-unit.source: PhantomStream sends one style-inlined snapshot, then tiny MutationObserver diffs addressed by stable node IDs. The viewer gets a live, semantically addressable, remotely controllable copy of the page at a fraction of the bandwidth of screen streaming.
trans-unit.target: PhantomStream 发送一个样式内联快照，然后发送由稳定节点 ID 寻址的微小 MutationObserver 差异。观看者只需屏幕流媒体带宽的一小部分即可获得实时的、语义可寻址的、可远程控制的页面副本。

trans-unit.source: In progressPrometheusThe Future of Autonomous Browsing36Days:11Hrs:42Min:Sec
trans-unit.target: 进行中Prometheus自主浏览的未来36天:11小时:42分钟:秒

trans-unit.source: In progressPrometheusThe Future of Autonomous Browsing36Days:11Hrs:42Min:Sec
trans-unit.target: 进行中Prometheus自主浏览的未来36天:11小时:42分钟:秒
为什么 DOM 流式传输

trans-unit.source: A live mirror that is cheap, exact, and addressable
trans-unit.target: 廉价、精确且可寻址的实时镜子

trans-unit.source: When an AI agent drives a browser, the human supervising it needs a live view of what the agent is doing. PhantomStream streams the DOM itself instead of pixels. It captures the page once as a style-inlined snapshot, assigns stable identifiers in a WeakMap, then watches the page with a MutationObserver and sends only small diffs (add, rm, attr, text) keyed by node ID and batched to the page's own paint cadence.
trans-unit.target: 当 AI 代理驱动浏览器时，监管人员需要实时查看代理正在执行的操作。 PhantomStream 流式传输 DOM 本身 而不是像素。它捕获页面一次作为样式内联快照，在 WeakMap 中分配稳定标识符，然后使用 MutationObserver 监视页面并仅发送小的差异（add， rm、attr、text）由节点 ID 键入，并按页面自己的绘制节奏进行批处理。

trans-unit.source: The payoff is a mirror whose bandwidth tracks how much the page actually changes rather than the frame rate. Text renders natively at any resolution, and remote control targets real elements by their stable IDs instead of guessing at coordinates.
trans-unit.target: 回报是一面镜子，其带宽跟踪页面实际变化的程度，而不是帧速率。文本以任何分辨率原生呈现，远程控制通过稳定的 ID 定位真实元素，而不是猜测坐标。

trans-unit.source: PhantomStream began as milestone v0.9.9.1 "Phantom Stream" inside FSB, where it powers the dashboard's live preview of automated browsing sessions. This repository turns it into a standalone plug-and-play framework, an SDKFSB plugs back in, and the working repository for an accompanying research paper.
trans-unit.target: PhantomStream 最初是 v0.9.9.1 "Phantom Stream" 里程碑的一部分，位于 FSB 内部，为仪表板提供自动浏览会话的实时预览。本仓库将其发展为独立的即插即用框架、可重新接入 SDK 的 FSB，同时也是配套研究论文的工作仓库。

trans-unit.source: The obvious tools for a live view are video. WebRTC, a CDP screencast, or a sequence of screenshots all send pixels. Pixels are heavy. Every frame costs bandwidth whether the page changed or not, encoding and decoding add latency, and the result is lossy and resolution bound.
trans-unit.target: 实时取景最明显的工具是视频。 WebRTC、CDP 截屏视频或一系列屏幕截图均发送像素。 像素很重。无论页面是否更改，每一帧都会消耗带宽，编码和解码会增加延迟，结果是有损和分辨率限制。

trans-unit.source: Worse, pixels are opaque. The watcher cannot ask which element the agent is touching, cannot highlight a node, cannot annotate the view, and cannot reliably drive the page back. Remote control over a video stream means clicking pixel coordinates against a frame that may already be stale, so a misaligned click lands on the wrong thing.
trans-unit.target: 更糟糕的是，像素是不透明的。观察者无法询问代理正在触摸哪个元素，无法突出显示节点，无法注释视图，并且无法可靠地驱动页面返回。对视频流的远程控制意味着在可能已经过时的帧上单击像素坐标，因此未对齐的单击会落在错误的位置上。

trans-unit.source: Why DOM streaming instead of video
trans-unit.target: 为什么 DOM 流而不是视频

trans-unit.source: Streaming structured DOM rather than frames changes the economics and the capabilities of the mirror across every axis that matters for supervising an agent.
trans-unit.target: 流式结构的 DOM 而不是框架改变了镜像在每个轴上的经济性和功能，这对监督代理很重要。

trans-unit.source: Continuous frames, independent of page content
trans-unit.target: 连续帧，与页面内容无关

trans-unit.source: One snapshot, then tiny diffs only when the page changes
trans-unit.target: 一张快照，然后仅在页面更改时出现微小差异

trans-unit.source: Encode, transmit, then decode per frame
trans-unit.target: 每帧编码、传输、然后解码

trans-unit.source: A text mutation is one small JSON op
trans-unit.target: 文本变更只是一个很小的 JSON 操作

trans-unit.source: Exact DOM, native text rendering, resolution independent
trans-unit.target: 精确 DOM，本机文本渲染，与分辨率无关

trans-unit.source: Pixel coordinates against a possibly stale frame
trans-unit.target: 针对可能陈旧帧的像素坐标

trans-unit.source: Real elements addressed by stable node IDs
trans-unit.target: 由稳定节点 ID 寻址的真实元素

trans-unit.source: The mirror is a DOM: queryable, highlightable, annotatable
trans-unit.target: 镜像为DOM：可查询、可突出显示、可注释

trans-unit.source: The page is captured, the host wraps each message for transport, a relay fans messages out to viewers, and the viewer rebuilds and applies them. Remote control runs the same path in reverse.
trans-unit.target: 页面被捕获，主机包装每条消息以进行传输，中继将消息扇出给查看器，然后查看器重建并应用它们。远程控制以相反的方式运行相同的路径。

trans-unit.source: Snapshot: clone, inline styles, stamp node IDs, then rAF-batched diffs
trans-unit.target: 快照：克隆、内联样式、标记节点 ID，然后 rAF 批处理差异
LZ-string 信封、会话标记、看门狗

trans-unit.source: WebSocket fan-out, 1 MiB cap, backpressure drop
trans-unit.target: WebSocket 扇出、1 MiB 帽、背压降

trans-unit.source: Sandboxed iframe, diff apply by ID, overlays, scale-to-fit
trans-unit.target: 沙盒 iframe、按 ID 应用差异、覆盖、缩放以适应

trans-unit.source: Capture owns identity in a WeakMap<Element, string> and emits nodeIds sidecars with snapshots and add ops, so a late diff always lands on the right element without mutating the live page.
trans-unit.target: 捕获在 WeakMap<Element, string> 中拥有的身份，并发出带有快照和添加操作的 nodeIds sidecar，因此后期差异始终会落在正确的元素上，而不会改变实时页面。
精心策划的计算式捕获

trans-unit.source: Roughly 85 visual-fidelity CSS properties are inlined per element rather than all 300+, with default-value elision. This took a YouTube serialize from 45 seconds down to interactive.
trans-unit.target: 每个元素仅内联约 85 个影响视觉保真度的 CSS 属性，而非全部 300 多项，并省略默认值。这使 YouTube 的序列化时间从 45 秒缩短到足以实时交互的水平。

trans-unit.source: Mutations batch and flush on requestAnimationFrame, so the mirror updates at the same cadence the page paints.
trans-unit.target: 突变在 requestAnimationFrame 上批量和刷新，因此镜像以页面绘制的相同节奏更新。

trans-unit.source: Every message carries a streamSessionId and a snapshotId. The viewer rejects stale messages, so late diffs from a previous page can never corrupt the mirror.
trans-unit.target: 每条消息都携带 streamSessionId 和 snapshotId。查看器拒绝过时的消息，因此与前一页的最新差异永远不会损坏镜像。

trans-unit.source: What you get out of the box

The capture core is plain JavaScript that injects as a content script, an addInitScript, or a bookmarklet, with no runtime build step. Capture, viewer, and relay all talk through a small transport seam.
trans-unit.target: 捕获核心是普通的 JavaScript，它作为内容脚本、addInitScript 或书签注入，没有运行时构建步骤。通过一个小的传输接缝捕获、查看和转发所有通话。

trans-unit.source: Diffs and remote-control actions address nodes by WeakMap identity, never by coordinate or fragile selector.
trans-unit.target: 差异和远程控制操作通过 WeakMap 标识来寻址节点，而不是通过坐标或脆弱选择器。

trans-unit.source: About 85 fidelity-critical CSS properties per element with default elision, keeping heavy pages interactive.
trans-unit.target: 每个元素大约有 85 个保真度关键的 CSS 属性（默认省略），从而保持大量页面的交互性。

trans-unit.source: One compact op per real change, flushed on requestAnimationFrame at the page's own update rate.
trans-unit.target: 每个实际更改一个紧凑的操作，以页面自己的更新速率刷新在 requestAnimationFrame 上。

trans-unit.source: Snapshots stay under the relay's per-message cap by dropping offscreen subtrees on whole-element boundaries.
trans-unit.target: 通过在整个元素边界上放置屏幕外子树，快照可以保持在中继的每条消息上限之下。

trans-unit.source: A capture-side timer and a host-side alarm independently recover a wedged stream by forcing a flush or fresh snapshot.
trans-unit.target: 捕获端计时器和主机端警报通过强制刷新或刷新快照来独立恢复楔入流。

trans-unit.source: The viewer rebuilds inside an iframe sandboxed to exactly allow-same-origin (never allow-scripts) with CSP and a post-parse scrub.
trans-unit.target: 查看器在 iframe 沙盒内重建为 allow-same-origin（绝不是 allow-scripts），并使用 CSP 和解析后清理。

trans-unit.source: blockSelector, maskTextSelector, and mask functions redact sensitive content before it leaves the page. Passwords always masked.
trans-unit.target: blockSelector、maskTextSelector 和掩码函数会在敏感内容离开页面之前对其进行编辑。密码始终被屏蔽。

trans-unit.source: Images, video, and audio load from their source URL in the viewer's own browser, so media bytes never cross the relay.
trans-unit.target: 图像、视频和音频从观看者自己的浏览器中的源 URL 加载，因此媒体字节永远不会穿过中继。

trans-unit.source: Drop the capture core into a Playwright or CDP page through a ready-made adapter, with authorized reverse remote control.
trans-unit.target: 通过现成的适配器将捕获核心放入Playwright或CDP页面中，并具有授权的反向远程控制。

trans-unit.source: PhantomStream renders attacker-influenced HTML with script execution disabled by construction. Serialization strips dangerous content on the wire clone only. The live page is never touched.
trans-unit.target: PhantomStream 呈现受攻击者影响的 HTML，并通过构造禁用脚本执行。序列化仅删除线路克隆上的危险内容。 直播页面从未被触及。

trans-unit.source: Sandbox is exactly allow-same-origin, never allow-scripts
trans-unit.target: Sandbox 正是 allow-same-origin，从不 allow-scripts

trans-unit.source: on* handlers, dangerous URL schemes, srcdoc, and object/embed stripped
trans-unit.target: on* 处理程序、危险 URL 方案、srcdoc，以及 object/embed 元素都会被移除

trans-unit.source: Private text and form values masked capture-side before transport
trans-unit.target: 传输前在捕获端屏蔽的私有文本和表单值

trans-unit.source: Fail-closed media fetch: https-only, private-range deny, no-referrer
trans-unit.target: 失败关闭的媒体获取：仅 https、私有范围拒绝、无引用
iframe sandbox = allow-same-origin，且仅允许此项
CSP 元标签与解析后清理
在传输副本的捕获端执行清理
在解析 srcdoc 前进行字符串层拦截

trans-unit.source: PhantomStream exposes one subpath per stage. Wire a capture in the page context, a viewer in the remote context, and a relay on Node to fan messages between them.
trans-unit.target: PhantomStream 每个阶段公开一个子路径。连接页面上下文中的捕获、远程上下文中的查看器以及 Node 上的中继，以在它们之间传递消息。

trans-unit.source: Or run it straight from the repository: npm run demo mirrors a source tab into a viewer tab, and npm run demo:playwright drives a page while a viewer mirrors it.
trans-unit.target: 或者直接从存储库运行它： npm run demo 将源选项卡镜像到查看器选项卡中，而 npm run demo:playwright 在查看器镜像页面时驱动页面。

trans-unit.source: The deeper treatment lives alongside the source. Each document is self-contained.
trans-unit.target: 更深层次的治疗与源头并存。每个文档都是独立的。

trans-unit.source: Loopback, WebSocket, Playwright/CDP, extension MV3, bookmarklet, CSSOM mode
End-to-end capture, transport, relay, and renderer pipeline plus limitations
trans-unit.target: 端到端捕获、传输、中继和渲染器管道以及限制

trans-unit.source: Threat model, sanitization, masking, CSP, and sandbox guarantees
trans-unit.target: 威胁模型、清理、屏蔽、CSP 和沙箱保证

trans-unit.source: How the system evolved, what failed, and why the current shape won
trans-unit.target: 该系统是如何演变的、失败的是什么以及为什么当前的形状获胜
为什么 DOM 流式传输
先生成一次快照，再流式传输差异
每条消息上限 1 MiB，背压时丢弃
客户端使用以下参数加入

trans-unit.source: PhantomStream is DOM-native live browser mirroring: one style-inlined snapshot, then MutationObserver diffs instead of pixels.
trans-unit.target: PhantomStream 是 DOM 原生实时浏览器镜像：一张样式内联快照，然后是 MutationObserver 差异而不是像素。

trans-unit.source: PhantomStream is DOM-native live browser mirroring: one style-inlined snapshot, then MutationObserver diffs instead of pixels. Ships capture, renderer, relay, and transport modules as @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream.
trans-unit.target: PhantomStream 是基于 DOM 的实时浏览器镜像：先生成一个内联样式的快照，随后传输 MutationObserver 差异而非像素。它以 @full-self-browsing/phantom-stream 提供捕获、渲染器、中继和传输模块。

trans-unit.source: March 2026v9.0.2 — Background Agents, Memory System, Server Sync, Anonymous Usage Telemetry, Legal Posture (full archived text)
trans-unit.target: 2026 年 3 月v9.0.2 — 后台智能体、记忆系统、服务器同步、匿名使用情况遥测、法律立场（完整存档文本）

trans-unit.source: Archived copy of the privacy policy as it stood in March 2026, before the May 2026 update. This snapshot preserves the then-current policy body, including later telemetry and legal-posture additions that were present on the Angular page before this archive pass.TLDR FSB operates entirely within your browser. No browsing data is collected. API keys are encrypted locally with AES-GCM. AI calls go directly from your browser to the provider you choose. The optional relay server for Background Agents stores only run metadata, never page content. Memory data stays on your device. Everything is open source and auditable.Data CollectionFSB operates entirely within your browser. The extension only accesses the DOM (Document Object Model) of the currently active tab when you initiate an automation task.No browsing history is collected or stored beyond the current sessionDOM data is analyzed locally and discarded after each automation stepNo personal information is harvested from pages you visitData StorageAll settings and data are stored locally in Chrome's extension storage. FSB uses AES-GCM encryption for sensitive data like API keys.Configuration is stored in chrome.storage.localAPI keys are encrypted before storage using AES-GCMSession logs are stored locally and can be cleared at any timeAnalytics data (task counts, success rates) stays on your deviceExternal ServicesFSB communicates with external AI providers only when you configure and use a hosted provider. If you use LM Studio, AI requests stay on your machine through its local OpenAI-compatible server. The choice of provider and what data is sent is under your control.Hosted API calls are made only to the provider you select (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or OpenRouter)LM Studio uses a local OpenAI-compatible server on your device and does not require an API keySent data includes: task description, DOM structure summary, and action contextIf you use the Remote Dashboard or Background Agents sync, an optional relay server handles WebSocket messages and stores agent run metadata (task name, cost, duration, success/fail). No page content, DOM data, or AI responses are stored on the server. This is opt-in onlyEach provider has their own privacy policy governing how they handle API requestsNo TrackingFSB does not include any analytics, telemetry, or tracking services. There are no cookies, no fingerprinting, and no third-party scripts beyond the AI provider APIs you explicitly configure.API KeysYour API keys are encrypted locally using AES-GCM before being stored. They are never transmitted anywhere except to the AI provider you configured, and only as authentication headers in API requests.Keys are encrypted at rest in Chrome storageDecryption only happens in-memory when making API callsKeys are never logged, exported, or sharedAuto-PasswordsFSB includes an optional credential manager that stores login credentials encrypted on your device. Passwords are never exposed to AI models. They are filled directly into pages by the content script, bypassing the AI entirely.Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with 256-bit keys and PBKDF2 key derivationWhen the AI analyzes a page, password field values are replaced with [hidden]. The actual password is never included in any AI promptAuto-fill is performed by the content script injecting values directly into the DOM, with no AI involvement in the credential flowThe credential list view only shows usernames and domains. Passwords are decrypted individually and only when needed for auto-fillCredentials are stored per-domain with parent domain fallback (e.g., accounts.google.com inherits from google.com)Prompt Injection PreventionWeb pages can contain hidden text designed to hijack AI agents. FSB implements multi-layered defenses to ensure the AI only follows your instructions, never instructions embedded in page content.All page content is wrapped in [PAGE_CONTENT] boundary markers, and the AI is instructed to never follow instructions found within these markersA sanitization engine strips known injection patterns (e.g., "ignore previous instructions", fake system prompts, override attempts) from all page content before it reaches the AIAI-generated actions are validated before execution. Dangerous URLs (javascript:, data:) and script injection attempts are blockedOnly a strict allowlist of 50+ known tools can be executed. The AI cannot invent or call arbitrary actionsContent size is capped (500 chars per value, 15K total prompt cap) to limit payload deliveryInvisible Unicode control characters that websites embed are stripped before processingBackground Agents and Server SyncIf you opt into Background Agents server sync or Remote Dashboard pairing, a relay server facilitates communication between your extension and the dashboard.The server stores: agent definitions (name, schedule, target URL), run metrics (token count, cost, duration, success/fail status), and session pairing tokensThe server does NOT store: page content, DOM data, browsing history, AI prompts, AI responses, or any data from the pages you visitAuthentication uses hash keys (generated locally) and session tokens that expire after 24 hoursOne-time pairing tokens expire after 60 seconds and cannot be reusedServer sync is disabled by default. You must explicitly enable it in OptionsMemory SystemFSB's memory system stores navigation patterns and site intelligence to improve automation over time.All memory data (semantic, episodic, procedural) is stored locally in chrome.storage.localNo memory data is sent to any external serverMemory can be viewed and cleared at any time from the Options dashboardSite maps and navigation patterns are domain-specific and isolated from each otherAnonymous Usage TelemetryFSB v0.9.69 introduced an opt-out anonymous usage telemetry pipeline so the project can publish aggregate adoption numbers (see /stats) without ever touching the pages you browse. Telemetry is on by default but can be disabled with a single toggle, and the per-install data can be erased on request.What we collectA random per-install UUID stored in chrome.storage.local under the key fsbInstallUuid. The UUID is generated locally and never tied to your identity.The name of the MCP client used (e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Codex), drawn from a fixed allowlist.The model name used for a session (e.g. grok-4-fast, claude-opus-4), drawn from a fixed allowlist.Aggregate input/output token counts per session.The number of active FSB agents on your install (an integer count).What we do NOT collectPage URLs, hostnames, or browsing history.Prompts, instructions, task descriptions, or any natural-language text you send to your model provider.Page DOM, screenshots, page content, or AI responses.Plaintext IP addresses. The server hashes the request IP with a daily-rotating salt for rate limiting and discards it.Names, usernames, account handles, or any free-form identity fields.Email addresses, phone numbers, or contact information.RetentionRaw events are retained for 7 days. Daily rollups (one row per install per day) are retained for 365 days. Global aggregates (one row per day, no per-install dimension) are retained indefinitely so historical charts on /stats remain stable.How to opt outOpen the FSB Control Panel, scroll to Advanced Settings, and toggle Send anonymous usage data off. The change takes effect immediately; no further events will be sent from your install.How to erase your dataTo request erasure of all telemetry rows associated with your install (GDPR Article 17), look up your fsbInstallUuid in Chrome DevTools → Application → Storage → Extension storage, then send a single HTTP request:curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '"install_uuid":"<your-uuid>"' \ https://full-selfbrowsing.com/api/telemetry/forgetLimited Use affirmationFSB's anonymous usage telemetry is used only to compute aggregate usage statistics displayed publicly at full-selfbrowsing.com/stats. The data is never sold, never shared with third parties, never used for advertising, and never used to train any machine-learning models. This commitment satisfies the Chrome Web Store's Limited Use requirement.Aggregated public metricsWe publish aggregated metrics derived from this telemetry pipeline at /stats. Only counts and totals are shown; no per-install row is ever exposed.Legal Posture and Consent ModelFSB's automation posture, audit-log retention, and per-origin consent model were presented as explicit product controls. FSB does nothing on an origin until you explicitly allow it, automated read access never implies write access, and a conservative service denylist blocks automation on sensitive categories (financial and government services) outright.Per-origin consent is default-off. Auto and write (mutating) access are separate, explicit opt-ins managed from the Control Panel's Consent & Audit section.Every capability call is recorded in a redacted, append-only local audit log. No arguments, tokens, cookies, or response bodies are ever stored.A service denylist renders sensitive origins non-enableable, enforced at the capability gate and not merely in the interface.Open SourceFSB is fully open source under the BSL 1.1 License. You can audit every line of code to verify these privacy claims. The source code is available on GitHub.Changes to This PolicyIf this policy is updated, the changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Significant changes will also be noted in the project's GitHub release notes.ContactIf you have questions about this privacy policy or FSB's data handling, please open an issue on GitHub Issues.
trans-unit.target: 这是 2026 年 3 月隐私政策的存档副本，内容为 2026 年 5 月更新前的版本。此快照保留当时完整的政策正文，也包含在本次存档前已出现在 Angular 页面上的遥测与法律立场补充内容。简要说明 FSB 完全在您的浏览器内运行，不会收集任何浏览数据。API 密钥会在本地使用 AES-GCM 加密。AI 调用会直接从浏览器发送到您选择的供应商。后台代理的可选中继服务器只会存储运行元数据，绝不存储页面内容。记忆数据会留在您的设备上。所有内容均为开源，并可接受审计。数据收集FSB 完全在您的浏览器内运行。扩展程序只会在您启动自动化任务时，访问当前活动标签页的 DOM（文档对象模型）。不会收集或存储当前会话以外的浏览记录DOM 数据会在本地分析，并在每个自动化步骤后丢弃不会从您访问的页面收集个人信息数据存储所有设置与数据皆存储在 Chrome 的扩展程序存储空间中。FSB 使用 AES-GCM 加密 API 密钥等敏感数据。设置存储在 chrome.storage.localAPI 密钥在存储前会使用加密算法 AES-GCM会话日志存储在本地，可随时清除分析数据（任务数量、成功率）会保留在您的设备上外部服务FSB 只会在您设置并使用托管供应商时，与外部 AI 供应商通信。如果您使用 LM Studio，AI 请求会通过您设备上的本地 OpenAI 兼容服务器处理。您可以自行控制所选供应商及发送的数据。托管 API 调用只会发送到您选择的供应商（xAI、OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 或 OpenRouter）LM Studio 使用您设备上的本地 OpenAI 兼容服务器，不需要 API 密钥发送的数据包括：任务描述、DOM 结构摘要和操作上下文如果您使用 Remote Dashboard 或后台代理同步功能，可选的中继服务器会处理 WebSocket 消息，并存储代理运行元数据（任务名称、成本、持续时间、成功／失败）。服务器不会存储任何页面内容、DOM 数据或 AI 响应。此功能仅在您主动启用时生效每个供应商都有自己的隐私政策，规范其处理 API 请求的方式不跟踪FSB 不包含任何分析、遥测或跟踪服务。除了您明确设置的 AI 供应商 API，不会使用 Cookie、浏览器指纹或第三方脚本。API 密钥您的 API 密钥会在存储前于本地使用 AES-GCM 加密。除了您设置的 AI 供应商外，绝不会发送到其他地方，且只会作为 API 请求中的身份验证请求头。密钥在 Chrome 存储空间中以加密形式静态存储只有在发出 API 调用时才会在内存中解密密钥绝不会被记录、导出或分享自动密码FSB 提供可选的凭据管理器，将登录凭据加密存储在您的设备上。密码绝不会暴露给 AI 模型，而是由内容脚本直接填入页面，完全绕过 AI。凭据静态存储时会使用 AES-GCM 和 256 位密钥，并通过 PBKDF2 派生密钥进行加密AI 分析页面时，密码字段的值会替换为 [hidden]。实际密码绝不会包含在任何 AI 提示中内容脚本会直接将值注入 DOM ，以完成自动填充，整个凭据流程不涉及 AI凭据列表只显示用户名和域名。密码仅在自动填充需要时单独解密凭据按域名存储，并以父域名作为回退（例如 accounts.google.com 继承自 google.com）提示注入防护网页可能包含企图劫持 AI 代理的隐藏文本。FSB 采用多层防护，确保 AI 只遵循您的指令，绝不遵循嵌入页面内容的指令。所有页面内容都会包在 [PAGE_CONTENT] 边界标记内，并明确要求 AI 绝不遵循这些标记内的指令页面内容发送给 AI 前，清理引擎会移除已知的注入模式（例如“忽略先前的指示”、伪造的系统提示及覆盖尝试）AI 生成的操作会在执行前接受验证。危险 URL（javascript:、data:）和脚本注入尝试都会被阻止只能执行严格白名单中的 50 多种已知工具。AI 无法自行构造或调用任意操作内容大小设有上限（每个值 500 个字符，提示总计上限 15K），以限制载荷传播网站嵌入的不可见 Unicode 控制字符会在处理前移除后台代理与服务器同步如果您启用后台代理服务器同步或配对 Remote Dashboard，中继服务器会协助扩展程序与仪表板通信。服务器会存储：代理定义（名称、调度、目标 URL）、运行指标（令牌数量、成本、持续时间、成功／失败状态），以及会话配对令牌服务器不会存储：页面内容、DOM 数据、浏览记录、AI 提示、AI 响应，或您访问页面中的任何数据验证使用本地生成的哈希密钥，以及 24 小时后到期的会话令牌一次性配对令牌会在 60 秒后到期，且无法重复使用服务器同步默认禁用。您必须在“选项”中明确启用记忆系统FSB 的记忆系统会存储导航模式和网站信息，以持续改进自动化。所有记忆数据（语义、情景、程序性）都存储在本地的 chrome.storage.local不会将任何记忆数据发送到外部服务器您可以随时在“选项”面板中查看和清除记忆数据站点地图和导航模式按域名相互隔离匿名使用情况遥测FSB v0.9.69 引入了可选择退出的匿名使用情况遥测流程，让项目能发布汇总的采用情况数据（请参阅 /stats），同时绝不接触您浏览的页面。遥测默认开启，但可通过一个开关禁用；也可应请求删除每次安装的数据。我们收集的内容每次安装时会随机生成一个 UUID，并存储在 chrome.storage.local 中，键名为 fsbInstallUuid 。此 UUID 在本地生成，绝不会与您的身份关联。所使用的 MCP 客户端名称（例如 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex），取自固定的白名单。会话中使用的模型名称（例如 grok-4-fast、claude-opus-4），取自固定的白名单。每个会话的汇总输入／输出令牌数量。您的安装中处于活动状态的 FSB 代理数量（整数）。我们不收集的内容页面 URLs、主机名或浏览记录。您发送给模型供应商的提示、指示、任务描述或任何自然语言文本。页面 DOM、截图、页面内容或 AI 响应。明文 IP 地址。服务器会使用每日轮换的盐对请求的 IP 进行哈希处理以限制速率，随后将其丢弃。姓名、用户名、账号标识或任何自由格式的身份信息字段。电子邮件地址、电话号码或联系信息。保留期限原始事件会保留 7 天。每日汇总（每次安装每天一列）会保留 365 天。全局汇总（每天一列，没有单独安装维度）会永久保留，让 /stats 上的历史图表保持稳定。如何选择退出打开 FSB 控制面板，滚动至“高级设置”，然后关闭 发送匿名使用情况数据。变更会立即生效；您的安装不会再发送任何事件。如何删除您的数据如要请求删除与您的安装相关的所有遥测数据行（GDPR 第 17 条），请查找您的 fsbInstallUuid：前往 Chrome DevTools → 应用程序 → 存储空间 → 扩展程序存储空间，然后发送一次 HTTP 请求：curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '"install_uuid":"<your-uuid>"' \ https://full-selfbrowsing.com/api/telemetry/forgetLimited Use 合规声明FSB 的匿名使用情况遥测只用于计算公开显示在 full-selfbrowsing.com/stats 的汇总使用情况统计。数据绝不出售、绝不与第三方分享、绝不用于广告，也绝不用于训练任何机器学习模型。此承诺符合 Chrome Web Store 的 Limited Use 要求。公开汇总指标我们在 /stats 发布由此遥测流程生成的汇总指标。只会显示计数与总数，绝不公开单独安装的数据行。法律立场与同意模式FSB 的自动化安全策略、审计日志保留方式和按来源同意模式，均通过明确的产品控件呈现。FSB 在您明确允许前，不会对任何来源执行操作；自动读取权限绝不代表写入权限，保守的服务拒绝列表会彻底阻止对敏感类别（金融和政府服务）的自动化。按来源同意默认关闭。Auto 与写入（更改）权限是两个独立且需要明确启用的选项，可在控制面板的“同意与审计”部分管理。每次能力调用都会记录在经过脱敏、仅可追加的本地审计日志中。任何参数、令牌、Cookie 或响应正文都不会被存储。服务拒绝列表使敏感来源无法启用；此限制由能力门控强制执行，而非仅体现在界面中。开源FSB 完全采用 BSL 1.1 许可证开源。您可以审计每一行代码，验证这些隐私声明。源代码可在 GitHub 获取。本政策的变更如果本政策更新，变更会反映在页面顶部的“上次更新”日期中。重大变更也会记录在项目的 GitHub 发行说明中。联系方式如果您对本隐私政策或 FSB 的数据处理方式有任何疑问，请在 GitHub Issues 提出问题。

trans-unit.source: February 2026v0.9 — Initial privacy policy (full archived text)
trans-unit.target: 2026 年 2 月v0.9 — 初始隐私政策（完整存档文本）

trans-unit.source: Archived copy of the initial privacy policy as it stood in February 2026. This snapshot is reproduced from the original static showcase page, with the page chrome removed and the policy content preserved.Data CollectionFSB operates entirely within your browser. The extension only accesses the DOM (Document Object Model) of the currently active tab when you initiate an automation task.No browsing history is collected or stored beyond the current sessionDOM data is analyzed locally and discarded after each automation stepNo personal information is harvested from pages you visitData StorageAll settings and data are stored locally in Chrome's extension storage. FSB uses AES-GCM encryption for sensitive data like API keys.Configuration is stored in chrome.storage.localAPI keys are encrypted before storage using AES-GCMSession logs are stored locally and can be cleared at any timeAnalytics data (task counts, success rates) stays on your deviceExternal ServicesFSB communicates with external AI providers only when you configure and use them. The choice of provider and what data is sent is under your control.API calls are made only to the provider you select (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google)Sent data includes: task description, DOM structure summary, and action contextNo data is sent to FSB servers -- there are noneEach provider has their own privacy policy governing how they handle API requestsNo TrackingFSB does not include any analytics, telemetry, or tracking services. There are no cookies, no fingerprinting, and no third-party scripts beyond the AI provider APIs you explicitly configure.API KeysYour API keys are encrypted locally using AES-GCM before being stored. They are never transmitted anywhere except to the AI provider you configured, and only as authentication headers in API requests.Keys are encrypted at rest in Chrome storageDecryption only happens in-memory when making API callsKeys are never logged, exported, or sharedAuto-Passwords BetaFSB includes an optional credential manager that stores login credentials encrypted on your device. Passwords are never exposed to AI models -- they are filled directly into pages by the content script, bypassing the AI entirely.Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with 256-bit keys and PBKDF2 key derivationWhen the AI analyzes a page, password field values are replaced with [hidden] -- the actual password is never included in any AI promptAuto-fill is performed by the content script injecting values directly into the DOM, with no AI involvement in the credential flowThe credential list view only shows usernames and domains -- passwords are decrypted individually and only when needed for auto-fillCredentials are stored per-domain with parent domain fallback (e.g., accounts.google.com inherits from google.com)Prompt Injection PreventionWeb pages can contain hidden text designed to hijack AI agents. FSB implements multi-layered defenses to ensure the AI only follows your instructions, never instructions embedded in page content.All page content is wrapped in [PAGE_CONTENT] boundary markers, and the AI is instructed to never follow instructions found within these markersA sanitization engine strips known injection patterns (e.g., "ignore previous instructions", fake system prompts, override attempts) from all page content before it reaches the AIAI-generated actions are validated before execution -- dangerous URLs (javascript:, data:) and script injection attempts are blockedOnly a strict allowlist of 30+ known tools can be executed -- the AI cannot invent or call arbitrary actionsContent size is capped (500 chars per value, 15K total prompt cap) to limit payload deliveryInvisible Unicode control characters that websites embed are stripped before processingOpen SourceFSB is fully open source under the MIT License. You can audit every line of code to verify these privacy claims. The source code is available on GitHub.View the source code on GitHubSummaryFSB processes data locally, encrypts sensitive information, never exposes passwords to AI models, defends against prompt injection attacks, communicates only with AI providers you choose, includes no tracking, and is fully auditable as open source software.
trans-unit.target: 这是 2026 年 2 月初版隐私政策的存档副本。此快照重现自原始静态展示页面，已移除页面框架并保留政策内容。数据收集FSB 完全在您的浏览器内运行。扩展程序只会在您启动自动化任务时，访问当前活动标签页的 DOM（文档对象模型）。不会收集或存储当前会话以外的浏览记录DOM 数据会在本地分析，并在每个自动化步骤后丢弃不会从您访问的页面收集个人信息数据存储所有设置与数据皆存储在 Chrome 的扩展程序存储空间中。FSB 使用 AES-GCM 加密 API 密钥等敏感数据。设置存储在 chrome.storage.localAPI 密钥在存储前会使用加密算法 AES-GCM会话日志存储在本地，可随时清除分析数据（任务数量、成功率）会保留在您的设备上外部服务FSB 只会在您设置并使用外部 AI 供应商时与其通信。您可以自行控制所选供应商及发送的数据。API 调用只会发送到您选择的供应商（xAI、OpenAI、Anthropic 或 Google）发送的数据包括：任务描述、DOM 结构摘要和操作上下文不会将数据发送到 FSB 服务器，因为根本不存在这类服务器每个供应商都有自己的隐私政策，规范其处理 API 请求的方式不跟踪FSB 不包含任何分析、遥测或跟踪服务。除了您明确设置的 AI 供应商 API，不会使用 Cookie、浏览器指纹或第三方脚本。API 密钥您的 API 密钥会在存储前于本地使用 AES-GCM 加密。除了您设置的 AI 供应商外，绝不会发送到其他地方，且只会作为 API 请求中的身份验证请求头。密钥在 Chrome 存储空间中以加密形式静态存储只有在发出 API 调用时才会在内存中解密密钥绝不会被记录、导出或分享自动密码测试版FSB 提供可选的凭据管理器，将登录凭据加密存储在您的设备上。密码绝不会暴露给 AI 模型，而是由内容脚本直接填入页面，完全绕过 AI。凭据静态存储时会使用 AES-GCM 和 256 位密钥，并通过 PBKDF2 派生密钥进行加密AI 分析页面时，密码字段的值会替换为 [hidden]；实际密码绝不会包含在任何 AI 提示中内容脚本会直接将值注入 DOM ，以完成自动填充，整个凭据流程不涉及 AI凭据清单只会显示用户名与域名；密码会单独解密，且只在自动填充需要时进行凭据按域名存储，并以父域名作为回退（例如 accounts.google.com 继承自 google.com）提示注入防护网页可能包含企图劫持 AI 代理的隐藏文本。FSB 采用多层防护，确保 AI 只遵循您的指令，绝不遵循嵌入页面内容的指令。所有页面内容都会包在 [PAGE_CONTENT] 边界标记内，并明确要求 AI 绝不遵循这些标记内的指令页面内容发送给 AI 前，清理引擎会移除已知的注入模式（例如“忽略先前的指示”、伪造的系统提示及覆盖尝试）AI 生成的操作会在运行前验证；危险 URL（javascript:、data:）和脚本注入尝试都会被阻止只能运行严格白名单中的 30 多项已知工具；AI 无法自行发明或调用任意操作内容大小设有上限（每个值 500 个字符，提示总计上限 15K），以限制载荷传播网站嵌入的不可见 Unicode 控制字符会在处理前移除开源FSB 完全采用 MIT 许可证开源。您可以审计每一行代码，验证这些隐私声明。源代码可在 GitHub 获取。在 GitHub 上查看源代码摘要FSB 会在本地处理数据、加密敏感信息，绝不向 AI 模型暴露密码，防范提示注入攻击，只与您选择的 AI 供应商通信，不含任何跟踪功能，并以开源形式提供完整审计能力。

trans-unit.source: TLDR: FSB operates entirely within your browser. No browsing data is collected by FSB servers, and AI calls go directly from your browser to the provider you choose. API keys are encrypted locally with AES-GCM, and memory data stays on your device. The only data that ever leaves your machine for FSB is opt-out anonymous usage telemetry that powers the public /stats page. If you pair Remote Dashboard, transient live-preview frames can pass through the relay during the session, but they are not stored. Everything is open source and auditable.
trans-unit.target: 简要说明： FSB 完全在您的浏览器内运行。FSB 服务器不会收集任何浏览数据，AI 调用会直接从浏览器发送到您选择的供应商。API 密钥会在本地以 AES-GCM 加密，记忆数据则保留在您的设备上。唯一会从您的设备发送给 FSB 的数据，是可选择退出的匿名使用情况遥测，用于为公开的 /stats 页面提供数据。如果您配对 Remote Dashboard，临时实时预览帧会在会话期间经过中继服务器，但不会存储。所有内容均为开源，并可接受审计。

trans-unit.source: FSB operates entirely within your browser. When you initiate an automation task, the extension may inspect the active tab's DOM (Document Object Model) and, when you invoke a capability, make same-origin site API requests from your browser session.
trans-unit.target: FSB完全在浏览器内运行 。 当您启动自动化任务时, 扩展可检查活动标签DOM(文件对象模型),并在援引能力时,建立同源网站API浏览器会话中的请求。

trans-unit.source: No browsing history is collected or stored beyond the current session
trans-unit.target: 不收集或保存当前会话之外的任何浏览历史

trans-unit.source: DOM data and site API results are analyzed locally and discarded after each automation step unless you explicitly save them in memory
trans-unit.target: DOM数据和网址API本地分析结果,并在每个自动化步骤后丢弃,除非您明确保存在内存中

trans-unit.source: No personal information is harvested from pages you visit
trans-unit.target: 不从你访问的页面采集任何个人信息

trans-unit.source: FSB's capability layer can call a site's own first-party API from the page context, using your already-authenticated browser session. These requests run locally in Chrome; first-party cookies or site auth may be attached by the browser for that target site, but FSB does not return, store, log, or send cookies, tokens, CSRF values, request bodies, or response bodies to FSB servers.
trans-unit.target: FSB 的能力层可在页面上下文中使用您已通过身份验证的浏览器会话，调用网站自身的第一方 API。这些请求会在 Chrome 中本地运行；浏览器可能会附加该目标网站的第一方 Cookie 或网站身份验证信息，但 FSB 不会将 Cookie、令牌、CSRF 值、请求正文或响应正文返回、存储、记录或发送到 FSB 服务器。

trans-unit.source: Capability invocations follow FSB's consent controls and are recorded only in the redacted local audit log: origin, capability slug, method, side-effect class, consent decision, and outcome. The audit log never stores invocation arguments, request bodies, response bodies, cookies, tokens, CSRF values, or site response payloads.
trans-unit.target: 能力调用会遵循 FSB 的同意控制，且仅记录在经过脱敏的本地审计日志中：来源、能力标识、方法、副作用类别、同意决定与结果。审计日志绝不会存储调用参数、请求正文、响应正文、Cookie、令牌、CSRF 值或网站响应载荷。
Chrome 权限中 FSB 请求的项目

trans-unit.source: To run web automation, FSB declares the following permissions in its Chrome manifest. Each is used only for the documented purpose; nothing is sent off-device on the strength of any of them.
trans-unit.target: 为了执行网页自动化，FSB 在其 Chrome 清单中声明以下权限。每项仅用于其记录的用途；不会以任何一项为依据将数据发送至设备外。

trans-unit.source: DOM and tabs, activeTab, scripting, tabs, windows, sidePanel, and host permission <all_urls>: read and write the active tab, inject the automation content script, list and switch tabs, and render the side panel
trans-unit.target: DOM 和标签页、activeTab、scripting、tabs、windows、sidePanel，以及主机权限 <all_urls>：读取和写入当前标签页，注入自动化内容脚本，列出并切换标签页，以及呈现侧边栏

trans-unit.source: Advanced automation, debugger: attach the Chrome DevTools Protocol for coordinate-based clicks, drag, and key-hold actions that the regular DOM API cannot perform. webNavigation: observe navigation start/finish events so automation waits for the right moment
trans-unit.target: 高级自动化，debugger：挂接 Chrome DevTools Protocol，以执行常规 DOM API 无法完成的基于坐标的点击、拖动和长按按键操作。webNavigation：监测导航开始和结束事件，使自动化在正确时机继续

trans-unit.source: Local storage, storage, unlimitedStorage: store your settings, credentials, payment methods, and memory in chrome.storage.local on your device. Unlimited storage lifts the default 10 MB quota so memory and session logs can grow without hitting a wall
trans-unit.target: 本地存储 ,storage,unlimitedStorage:将您的设置,证书,支付方法,以及内存存储在设备上的 chrome.storage.local. 无限制存储可以解除默认的 10 MB 配额, 这样内存和会话日志可以在不撞墙的情况下增长

trans-unit.source: UX helpers, clipboardWrite: write copy-to-clipboard results from automation. alarms: schedule background housekeeping. offscreen: host the speech-to-text recorder in a hidden document because service workers cannot capture audio directly
trans-unit.target: UX帮助者,clipboardWrite:通过自动化将复制到剪贴板的结果写入. alarms:安排背景内务。 offscreen:在隐藏文档中托管语音对文本记录器,因为服务人员无法直接捕捉音频

trans-unit.source: Microphone access for speech-to-text is not declared in the manifest. Chrome shows its own permission prompt the first time you use the mic button.
trans-unit.target: 语音转文字所需的麦克风访问权限未在清单中声明。当你首次使用麦克风按钮时，Chrome 会自行弹出权限请求。

trans-unit.source: All settings and data are stored locally in Chrome's extension storage. FSB uses AES-GCM encryption for sensitive data like API keys.
trans-unit.target: 所有设置和数据都保存在 Chrome 扩展的本地存储中。FSB 对 API Key 等敏感数据使用 AES-GCM 加密。
配置保存在 chrome.storage.local 中

trans-unit.source: API keys are encrypted before storage using AES-GCM
trans-unit.target: API Key 在保存前会使用 AES-GCM 加密

trans-unit.source: Session logs are stored locally and can be cleared at any time
trans-unit.target: 会话日志保存在本地，可随时清除

trans-unit.source: Analytics data (task counts, success rates) stays on your device
trans-unit.target: 分析数据（任务计数、成功率）保留在你的设备上

trans-unit.source: FSB communicates with external AI providers only when you configure and use a hosted provider. If you use LM Studio, AI requests stay on your machine through its local OpenAI-compatible server. The choice of provider and what data is sent is under your control.
trans-unit.target: FSB 仅在你配置并使用托管提供商时，才与外部 AI 提供商通信。如果你使用 LM Studio，AI 请求会通过其本地 OpenAI 兼容服务器留在本机。提供商选择与发送的数据完全由你掌控。

trans-unit.source: Hosted API calls are made only to the provider you select (xAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or OpenRouter)
trans-unit.target: 托管 API 调用只会发往你选择的提供商（xAI、OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 或 OpenRouter)

trans-unit.source: LM Studio uses a local OpenAI-compatible server on your device and does not require an API key
trans-unit.target: LM Studio 在你的设备上使用本地 OpenAI 兼容服务器，且无需 API Key

trans-unit.source: Sent data includes: task description, DOM structure summary, and action context
trans-unit.target: 发送的数据包括:任务说明,DOM结构摘要和行动背景

trans-unit.source: If you pair Remote Dashboard or use legacy Background Agents sync, an optional relay server handles WebSocket messages for that session. Live-preview frames may pass through the relay transiently, but page content, DOM data, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, and site API payloads are not persisted on the server. This is opt-in only
trans-unit.target: 如果您配对 Remote Dashboard 或使用旧版后台代理同步功能，可选的中继服务器会处理该会话的 WebSocket 消息。实时预览帧可能会暂时经过中继服务器，但服务器不会保留页面内容、DOM 数据、截图、AI 提示、AI 响应、Cookie、令牌或网站 API 载荷。此功能仅在您主动启用时生效

trans-unit.source: Each provider has their own privacy policy governing how they handle API requests
trans-unit.target: 每个提供商都有自己的隐私政策，规定其如何处理 API 请求

trans-unit.source: Remote Dashboard and PhantomStream Live Preview

When you pair Remote Dashboard, FSB can show a live preview of the active browser tab using PhantomStream. The preview streams structured DOM data instead of pixels: an initial snapshot, MutationObserver diffs, scroll position, automation overlays, dialog state, media playback state, and remote-control messages over WebSocket.
trans-unit.target: 配对 Remote Dashboard 时，FSB 可使用 PhantomStream 显示当前浏览器标签页的实时预览。预览流传输结构化 DOM 数据而非像素，包括初始快照、MutationObserver 差异、滚动位置、自动化叠加层、对话框状态、媒体播放状态，以及通过 WebSocket 传输的远程控制消息。

trans-unit.source: The relay forwards those live-preview frames only to the paired dashboard session. FSB servers do not persist page DOM, page content, screenshots, AI prompts, AI responses, cookies, tokens, or site API payloads from the preview stream
trans-unit.target: 中继服务器只会将这些实时预览帧转送到已配对的仪表板会话。FSB 服务器不会保留预览流中的页面 DOM、页面内容、截图、AI 提示、AI 响应、Cookie、令牌或网站 API 载荷

trans-unit.source: FSB enables PhantomStream input masking (maskInputs: true), so passwords and form-control values are masked before they leave the captured page
trans-unit.target: FSB 会启用 PhantomStream 输入内容遮蔽（maskInputs: true），因此密码和表单控件的值会在离开被捕获页面前被遮蔽

trans-unit.source: The dashboard viewer renders mirrored content in a scriptless sandbox and sanitizes mirrored DOM and CSS before display
trans-unit.target: 仪表盘查看器将镜像内容装在一个无脚本的沙盒中并对镜像进行消毒DOM和CSS显示前

trans-unit.source: Images, video, and audio are mirrored by reference in current dashboard mode. Media bytes do not cross the relay; the viewer may fetch allowed public HTTPS asset or media URLs directly, while private, internal, non-HTTPS, or otherwise blocked origins are replaced with placeholders by PhantomStream's fail-closed fetch policy
trans-unit.target: 在目前的仪表板模式下,图像,视频,和音频通过参考镜像. 媒体字节不通过中继器; 查看器可能获取允许的公开HTTPS资产或媒体 URL 直接,而私人、内部、非HTTPS,或以其他方式被封存的源头替换为占位符PhantomStream失败的获取策略

trans-unit.source: FSB does not include any third-party analytics, ad trackers, or cross-site fingerprinting. There are no cookies and no third-party scripts beyond the AI provider APIs you explicitly configure. The one piece of first-party data FSB sends home is the opt-out Anonymous Usage Telemetry described below, used solely to power the public /stats dashboard.
trans-unit.target: FSB 不包含任何第三方分析、广告跟踪器或跨站点指纹识别。除你显式配置的 AI 提供商 APIs 之外，没有 Cookie，也没有第三方脚本。FSB 向自身发送的唯一第一方数据是下面描述的可选退出的匿名使用遥测，仅用于驱动公开的 /stats 仪表板。

trans-unit.source: Your API keys are encrypted locally using AES-GCM before being stored. They are never transmitted anywhere except to the AI provider you configured, and only as authentication headers in API requests.
trans-unit.target: 你的 API Key 会在保存前通过 AES-GCM 在本地加密。除了你配置的 AI 提供商之外，绝不会发送到任何地方，且只在 API 请求的身份验证头中使用。

trans-unit.source: Keys are encrypted at rest in Chrome storage
trans-unit.target: Key 在 Chrome 存储中以加密形式静态保存

trans-unit.source: Decryption only happens in-memory when making API calls
trans-unit.target: 仅在 API 调用时在内存中解密

trans-unit.source: Keys are never logged, exported, or shared
trans-unit.target: Key 绝不会被记录、导出或共享

trans-unit.source: FSB includes an optional credential manager that stores login credentials encrypted on your device. Passwords are never exposed to AI models. They are filled directly into pages by the content script, bypassing the AI entirely.
trans-unit.target: FSB 提供可选的凭据管理器，将登录凭据加密保存到你的设备。密码不会暴露给 AI 模型，而是由内容脚本直接填入页面，完全绕过 AI。

trans-unit.source: Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with 256-bit keys and PBKDF2 key derivation
trans-unit.target: 凭据静态存储时使用 AES-GCM 和 256 位密钥，并通过 PBKDF2 派生密钥进行加密

trans-unit.source: When the AI analyzes a page, password field values are replaced with [hidden]. The actual password is never included in any AI prompt
trans-unit.target: AI 分析页面时，密码字段的值会被替换为 [hidden]。真实密码绝不会出现在任何 AI 提示中

trans-unit.source: Auto-fill is performed by the content script injecting values directly into the DOM, with no AI involvement in the credential flow
trans-unit.target: 自动填充由内容脚本直接插入到DOM 中,没有AI参与证书流

trans-unit.source: The credential list view only shows usernames and domains. Passwords are decrypted individually and only when needed for auto-fill
trans-unit.target: 凭据列表视图仅显示用户名和域名。密码只在自动填充需要时单独解密

trans-unit.source: Credentials are stored per-domain with parent domain fallback (e.g., accounts.google.com inherits from google.com)
trans-unit.target: 凭据按域名存储，并具备父域回退（例如 accounts.google.com 会继承 google.com)

trans-unit.source: FSB includes an optional payment-method vault that stores card details on your device for checkout auto-fill. Cards are treated with the same encryption and AI isolation as login credentials, and the full card number is never sent to any AI model.
trans-unit.target: FSB 包含一个可选的付款方式保险库，将卡片信息保存在你的设备上以便结账时自动填写。卡片采用与登录凭据相同的加密与 AI 隔离机制，完整的卡号绝不会发送给任何 AI 模型。

trans-unit.source: Card details (number, expiry, cardholder, and zip) are encrypted at rest using AES-GCM with the same vault-derived key used for credentials
trans-unit.target: 卡片信息（卡号、有效期、持卡人和邮编）使用与凭据相同的保险库派生密钥，通过 AES-GCM 在静态时加密

trans-unit.source: When the AI analyzes a checkout page, any detected card-number field values are replaced with [hidden] before the prompt is built. Card numbers, CVV, and expiry are never included in any AI prompt
trans-unit.target: 当 AI 分析结账页面时，检测到的卡号字段值会在构建提示词之前被替换为 [hidden]。卡号、CVV 和有效期绝不会包含在任何 AI 提示词中
